# Pull Request

- [ ] Blue-only
- [ ] Red-zone change
- [ ] Gray-zone change
- [ ] API / contract change
- [ ] Persistence / schema change
- [ ] Security-sensitive change
- [ ] Boundary-rule change (architecture-test files)
